title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Multiple Lens account invites display, accept, and decline behavior in App Settings > General > Account on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: Navigate to App Settings → General → Account
Cloud Admin sends invites for two different Lens accounts to the mobile user's email
Log in to the app with the user's email
Verify that two invites are displayed on the Account screen
Verify that the invites are no longer visible
Log back in with the same user's email
Verify that both invites are displayed again
Accept one of the two invites
Verify that the accepted invite is removed from the list and the other invite remains
Verify that the tenant information displayed matches the accepted invite
Return to App Settings → General → Account
Verify that the declined invite is removed from the list
Verify that the tenant information remains unchanged and still matches the accepted invite
expected: User can see two invites upon login; logging out hides them; logging back in shows both; accepting one invite removes it while the other remains; Support > App shows tenant info matching the accepted invite; declining the remaining invite removes it; Support > App tenant info remains unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
